reason: The change modifies mount options for /home, which is a filesystem alteration. Incorrectly setting noexec could prevent execution of necessary user binaries or scripts, potentially breaking login or application functionality.
estimated_impact: reboot required; filesystems affected; May block execution of legitimate user programs or scripts located in /home; Could interfere with user login scripts or desktop environments if they rely on binaries in /home; Requires remount or reboot to take effect, risking temporary unavailability
